title: thelycrania koehneana
intro: Thelycrania koehneana, also known as Koehne's thelycrania, is a plant species in the family Thelycraniaceae, native to the tropical regions of Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Thelycrania koehneana is used for its health benefits, including treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of traditional medicine.
